allow: Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('d:/Side Hustle/CertBuddy-Resource/CertBuddy/content/dp-700/Practice/FinalExam/FinalExam2.json','utf8'\)\); const q=d.questions.find\(x=>x.question.includes\('Halden Group'\)\); const a=Array.isArray\(q.answer\)?q.answer:[q.answer]; console.log\('keyed='+JSON.stringify\(a\),'count='+a.length\); for\(const x of a\){if\(!q.options[x]\)throw new Error\('missing '+x\)} console.log\('both present:',a.every\(x=>q.options[x]\)\); console.log\('options:',Object.keys\(q.options\).join\(','\)\); console.log\('mirroring still present in options?', JSON.stringify\(q.options\).toLowerCase\(\).includes\('mirror'\)\); console.log\('total questions='+d.questions.length,'JSON parse OK'\)")
